title: A los cirujanos se les va la mano
original_title: A los cirujanos se les va la mano
overview: Two orderlies pretend to be surgeons to impress two young doctors and conquer, through several scenarios. Finally, they are discovered when they had to operate on a mafia boss to remove a bullet.
